failed_attempts:
funext m n
  induction m generalizing n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ m ih_m =>
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      rw [A]
      dsimp [myA]
      rw [ih_m]
    | succ n ih_n =>
      rw [A]
      dsimp [myA]
      rw [ih_n, ih_m]

funext m n
  induction m generalizing n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ m ih_m =>
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp [A]
      rw [ih_m]
      rfl
    | succ n ih_n =>
      simp [A]
      rw [ih_m, ih_n]
      rfl

funext m n
  induction m generalizing n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ m hm =>
    induction n with
    | zero => simp [A, hm]; rfl
    | succ n hn => simp [A, hm, hn]; rfl

ext m n
  induction m generalizing n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ m ih_m =>
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      rw [A, ih_m]
      rfl
    | succ n ih_n =>
      rw [A, ih_n, ih_m]
      rfl

funext m n
  induction m generalizing n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ m IHm =>
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp [A]
      exact IHm 1
    | succ n IHn =>
      simp [A]
      rw [IHm]
      congr
      exact IHn

funext m n
  induction m generalizing n <;> try rfl
  induction n <;> rw [A] <;> dsimp [myA] <;> simp [*]

  induction m generalizing n with
  | zero =>
    dsimp [myA]
    rw [A]
  | succ m ih =>

      rw [A]
      exact ih 1
    | succ n ihn =>
      dsimp [myA]
      rw [A]
      rw [ihn]
      exact ih _
